channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | After US-Iran, Why Is Pakistan Suddenly 'Brokering' Peace In Libya Now? Hint: $4 Billion

media:content.media:description: Pakistan Army Chief Asim Munir in Benghazi, Libya, in December 2025

item.description: According to reports, Pakistan became one of the interlocutors alongside the US, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Turkey.
item.content:encoded: According to reports, Pakistan became one of the interlocutors alongside the US, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Turkey.

item.title: US Officer Shoots Mexico Man With No Criminal Conviction, Family Seeks Probe

media:content.media:description: The shooting happened on Tuesday in Magnolia Park in Houston.

item.description: The shooting was at least the eighth death resulting from an encounter with federal immigration officers since the start of the immigration crackdown.
item.content:encoded: The shooting was at least the eighth death resulting from an encounter with federal immigration officers since the start of the immigration crackdown.

item.title: Inside Sri Lanka's Spy-Thriller Probe Into Deadly 2019 'Easter Bombings'

media:content.media:description: Sri Lanka says seven Sunni Muslim suicide bombers attacked three luxury hotels and three churches

item.description: The so-called Easter bombings on April 21, 2019, which killed 279 people and wounded more than 500, were blamed on Islamist militants.
item.content:encoded: The so-called Easter bombings on April 21, 2019, which killed 279 people and wounded more than 500, were blamed on Islamist militants.

item.title: Instructor Opens Aircraft Door, Jumps Mid-Flight. Stuuned Student Forced To Land Plane

media:content.media:description: Despite the shock, Rosario managed to remain calm and safely landed the aircraft without damage.

item.description: Leandro Andrés Bertazzo, 42, unbuckled his seatbelt, removed his headset, opened the aircraft door and jumped from the plane.
item.content:encoded: Leandro Andrés Bertazzo, 42, unbuckled his seatbelt, removed his headset, opened the aircraft door and jumped from the plane.

item.title: "US Bases Our Problem, Not Neighbours": Iranian Experts On Middle East Attacks

media:content.media:description: Iranian experts said that Khamenei's death in the US-Israel strikes has "united the people of Iran".

item.description: Prof Seyed Emamain, Founder of Governance and Policy Thinktank (GPTT), and Ali Salehian, Head of the International Department GPTT, have spoken to NDTV about the mass uprising against Khamenei's rule in January to mass support after his death.
item.content:encoded: Prof Seyed Emamain, Founder of Governance and Policy Thinktank (GPTT), and Ali Salehian, Head of the International Department GPTT, have spoken to NDTV about the mass uprising against Khamenei's rule in January to mass support after his death.

item.title: Monsoon Landslide Kills Five Children At Rohingya Refugee Camp In Bangladesh

media:content.media:description: More than 1 million refugees live in the camp.

item.description: Three days earlier, landslides killed at least eight people at Rohingya camps in the area.
item.content:encoded: Three days earlier, landslides killed at least eight people at Rohingya camps in the area.

item.title: Democrat Graham Platner Out Of US Senate Race After Rape Allegation

media:content.media:description: Platner, a Marine veteran, won last month's Democratic primary

item.description: Graham Platner denies the rape claim but suspends his campaign, leaving Maine Democrats with days to find a replacement to challenge Susan Collins.
item.content:encoded: Graham Platner denies the rape claim but suspends his campaign, leaving Maine Democrats with days to find a replacement to challenge Susan Collins.

item.title: Trump Tempers Fury To End NATO Summit On High Note

media:content.media:description: US President Donald Trump offered NATO allies an unexpected warm embrace

item.description: Trump shifted from bashing allies over Iran to praising NATO unity, while licensing Ukraine to build Patriot missiles and securing U.S. ties.
item.content:encoded: Trump shifted from bashing allies over Iran to praising NATO unity, while licensing Ukraine to build Patriot missiles and securing U.S. ties.

item.title: On Way To Temple, 25-Year-Old Indian Student Killed In Road Accident In US

media:content.media:description: Atluri's cousin Ravi Kumar Atluri has launched a fundraising campaign

item.description: According to her family, Atluri was on her way to a temple with her friends when the accident occurred. While their car was waiting at a traffic signal, it was reportedly hit by another speeding vehicle from behind.
item.content:encoded: According to her family, Atluri was on her way to a temple with her friends when the accident occurred. While their car was waiting at a traffic signal, it was reportedly hit by another speeding vehicle from behind.

item.title: Trump Warns US Will Hit Iran '20 Times' Harder If Tehran Doesn't Halt Attacks

media:content.media:description: "Every time they hit us, we're going to hit them 20," Trump said

item.description: Trump reinforced that message when speaking with reporters aboard Air Force One, returning from a NATO summit in Turkey.
item.content:encoded: Trump reinforced that message when speaking with reporters aboard Air Force One, returning from a NATO summit in Turkey.

item.title: Western Europe Records Hottest June Amid Intense Heatwave

media:content.media:description: Europe's hottest June sparks deadly heat dome, thousands dead

item.description: Western Europe recorded its hottest June ever, with a brutal heat dome triggering thousands of deaths across France, Spain and Belgium
item.content:encoded: Western Europe recorded its hottest June ever, with a brutal heat dome triggering thousands of deaths across France, Spain and Belgium

item.title: Ebola Deaths In Democratic Republic Of Congo Surpasses 500

media:content.media:description: The outbreak, declared on May 15, has so far infected 1,759 people

item.description: Suspected Ebola cases have emerged in Kisangani, a major DR Congo city, as the outbreak's death toll hits 600 and health teams race to contain spread
item.content:encoded: Suspected Ebola cases have emerged in Kisangani, a major DR Congo city, as the outbreak's death toll hits 600 and health teams race to contain spread

item.title: "Win-Win Proposition": PM Modi Urges Australian Businesses To Invest In India

media:content.media:description: PM Modi invited Australian investors to take advantage of long-term investment opportunities in India.

item.description: PM Modi pitches India as a prime destination for Australian investment at CEO forum.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1124766/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>PM Modi pitches India as a prime destination for Australian investment at CEO forum.

item.title: PM Modi Highlights Australia's Role In India's 500 GW Renewable Energy Target

media:content.media:description: PM Modi invites Australian investors to participate in India's infrastructure growth

item.description: PM Modi invites Australian investors to participate in India’s infrastructure growth
item.content:encoded: PM Modi invites Australian investors to participate in India’s infrastructure growth

item.title: PM Modi, Anthony Albanese Frame India-Australia Ties In A Historic Selfie

media:content.media:description: PM Modi characterised the two nations as "natural and trusted partners" amid global uncertainty.

item.description: PM Modi urges deeper India Australia cooperation in clean energy, infrastructure, and AI at CEO Forum
item.content:encoded: PM Modi urges deeper India Australia cooperation in clean energy, infrastructure, and AI at CEO Forum

item.title: "I May Be Gone": Trump Says He's "Number One" On Iran's "Kill List"

media:content.media:description: Trump used his old Air Force One plane to leave Turkey after a NATO summit

item.description: Trump also talked about the alleged plot to kill him during his interaction with reporters aboard Air Force One, while being questioned about why he wasn't using a new presidential jet gifted by Qatar to depart from the NATO conference.
item.content:encoded: Trump also talked about the alleged plot to kill him during his interaction with reporters aboard Air Force One, while being questioned about why he wasn't using a new presidential jet gifted by Qatar to depart from the NATO conference.

item.title: These High-Tech Futuristic Airships Are Helping Europe Keep An Eye On Russia

media:content.media:description: Kelluu has permission to operate around the clock along Finland's eastern border.

item.description: A Finnish startup is using autonomous airships to monitor borders, track threats and support Europe's defence efforts.
item.content:encoded: A Finnish startup is using autonomous airships to monitor borders, track threats and support Europe's defence efforts.

item.title: Video: Iran Releases Footage Of Khamenei's Destroyed Home For The First Time

media:content.media:description: The footage has been released to coincide with Khamenei's burial

item.description: Khamenei was killed on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran on February 28. Along with him, many of his family members were also killed
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1124823/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Khamenei was killed on the first day of the US-Israeli war on Iran on February 28. Along with him, many of his family members were also killed

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: US Hits '90 Targets', Including Rail Bridges In New Strikes On Iran

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.
item.content:encoded: Iran-US War News LIVE: The US military has hit a variety of military sites and port facilities after blaming Iran for targeting several merchant vessels off the coast of Oman, sparking Iranian fire then as well.

item.title: Indian Techie Kills Wife In US Home, Sends Body's Photo To Lover In India

media:content.media:description: On the day of the crime, Narne had called his girlfriend at least four times.

item.description: Investigation revealed that Narne had a "secret relationship" with a woman in India for many years.
item.content:encoded: Investigation revealed that Narne had a "secret relationship" with a woman in India for many years.
